hints.text: Overseas **department of France** (counts as France), Caribbean between Dominica & St Lucia; coverage = only **3 Gen3 trekkers** — memorise them rather than metas
**Habitation Clément** rum distillery trekker: warehouse w/ truck & forklift, an **H-beam steel** structure, a red-soil dirt track w/ palm trees
**Coastal southern trekker**: hilly path w/ other people, houses w/ orange roofs, ends at a car park w/ stalls
**Jardin de Balata** trekker: dark, humid jungle — buttress-root trees, ferns & bamboo; a man in a black shirt & grey cap sometimes visible
